text.title: lint-staged-only-not-whole-tree Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lint-staged-only-not-whole-tree as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Wrapping a hook command in `bash -c "ruff check --fix ."` to "make it work the same in CI and locally."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The hook now ignores the staged file list because the wrapper drops $@. The CI/local parity is achieved instead by having a CI step that runs `ruff check .` on the whole tree separately — never by inflating the hook.

failure-mode.description: Wiring a single `tsc` hook for an entire monorepo, scoped to all `*.ts` files.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every commit anywhere in the monorepo triggers a full type-check of every project. Latency goes to minutes, the floor collapses, agents bypass.
